flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of the Redwoods fell 65% between 2007 and 2010 (16.4% → 5.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of the Redwoods rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at College of the Redwoods vs the 2004–2008 baseline (3.5k vs 4.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at College of the Redwoods fell 11% between 2009 and 2010 (5.2% → 4.7%).
